test-appsettings-2026-07-03.description: xUnit test project for AppSettings: 15 tests all green.

fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-07.description: Persist Brightness and ColorTemperature in AppSettings. Load on startup, save on each change. Build passes.

test-appsettings-extended-2026-07-04.description: Extend AppSettings tests from 15 to 22: overwrite, null-bool, unknown-props, path, format tests. All green.

fix-persist-settings-start-with-windows-.description: Comprehensive fix: persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn, StartWithWindows in AppSettings. Restore all on startup. Add Start with Windows tray menu item with HKCU Run registry entry. Build passes.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-04 run (13:11 UTC): Tasks 10+3. Created comprehensive fix branch 'fix-persist-settings-start-with-windows-2026-07-04': adds Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn, StartWithWindows to AppSettings; restores all values on startup; adds 'Start with Windows' tray menu item with registry logic. Build passes. Monthly summary #103 updated.
